notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher Matt Brash. Coby Mayo scores. Blaze Alexander to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Samuel Basallo pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Mariners challenged (timing play), call on the field was overturned: Samuel Basallo flies into a double play, center fielder Julio Rodríguez to second baseman Ryan Bliss. Blaze Alexander out at 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Josh Naylor grand slam
notableEvents.detail: Josh Naylor hits a grand slam (7) to right field. Jhonny Pereda scores. Cole Young scores. Julio Rodríguez scores.
